summary: Deliverable is incomplete and non-functional. Critical missing files: (1) SecretRotationValidator.Tests.ps1 referenced in workflow line 29 does not exist; (2) fixtures/secrets-standard.json referenced in workflow lines 42 & 45 and Invoke-ActTests.ps1 line 48 does not exist. Workflow will fail immediately. Code structure is sound (good function modularity, proper error handling in test harness), but: Pester installation duplicated (workflow lines 19-25 and 33-37 should be factored into composite action or matrix); actions not SHA-pinned (uses @v4 tag, violates stated best practice); limited error handling for JSON/date parsing in SecretRotationValidator.ps1; hard-coded fixture paths reduce flexibility. Test harness only defines one test case.
